item.title: He's right you know
item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: It's less impressive knowing I was using an 8 week program though...
item.description: So many years ago I purchased an app called Zombies Run 5k at the recommendation of my older sister. Zombies Run 5k is an 8 week program that each week is 3 days. It tells the story about you being found outside the Abel compound where you're recruited to become a runner, which is a person that runs into the surrounding area to find supplies, but before you officially become one, you have to train to increase your stamina. Unfortunately in all the time owning it ive never finished it. I'd pick it up, get about 3-4 weeks into the program, then stop. Pick it back up, rinse and repeat. But for the first time, I'm on week 8. Friday is my very last one and it's supposed to be my first 5k. So today on day 2 of week 8, it had you do 3 sets of runs, with 2 being 10 minutes straight and one being 5 minutes, with some 5 minute walks in-between to cool off a bit. The very first run while still being fresh, for the first time ever I jogged for just shy of 10 minutes straight without stopping and I'm fucking proud of myself. Every week as I continue my fitness journey as a middle aged dude, something has changed in me mentally as everytime I've gone down this path, I haven't been able to make it stick for more than a few months. TLDR: I'm making progress in my workouts.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: Trump's horrific advice may have just gotten people killed
item.description: BREAKING: Trump's "advice" to oil tankers: "Show some guts, sail through Hormuz anyway." Iran's response: Tanker decimated, fire raging in the Persian Gulf. This isn't leadership — it's playing with lives for ego points. How many more have to die? #TrumpIrresponsible #HormuzDisaster #IranWar #WakeUpAmerica Quote-tweet your thoughts — follow for unfiltered truth

25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @AnthonyChristopherArt gave us a peek into his sketchbook. Absolutely fantastic. Check out their posts for more awesomeness.
27 Man Tax: Chris Pratt
“The need for mystery is greater than the need for an answer.” - Ken Kesey So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Key takeaways from a docu on the manosphere, so we can save ourselves our sanity
item.description:
Document Inside the Manosphere reported on by Adam Saraswati Rawlings, for The New Feminist magazine
Crufts (capital "C") is a dog show.
Only perverts shriek that loudly about porn and sharing pornography apps with their family members. Trans porn consumption is also very high in red areas.
They profit off of loneliness.
Freud was right AGAIN. Every time it's an obvious daddy issue, Occams razor dictates that it's probably certainly just a daddy issue.
The conspiratorial mindedness pipeline all flows to antisemitic racism.
They live on the pillowy comfort of cognitive bias confirmation by echo chambers.
Ideological acrophily interacts with audience capture to gravitate more extreme claims and behavior to draw attention to views more radical than their average audience member.
When in doubt, follow the money. Super simple rule from analyzing if a group is a cult. If the money only flows to one person in one direction, it's probably financially abusive.
All credit to The New Feminist and Adam Saraswati Rawlings
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: A US-owned oil tanker is on fire. It was hit by Iranian drone speedboats off the Iraqi port of Umm Qasr.
item.description: Two tankers were hit, the US-owned "Safesea Vishnu" and the Greek-owned "Zefyros." At least one crewmember, ship and nationality unknown, is dead. 38 more have been pulled from the water by SAR boats. The two ships had a cargo of naphtha and petroleum condensates, both highly flammable, and used as feedstocs for plastic and gasoline. https://www.timesnownews.com/world/middle-east/iran-hits-us-owned-oil-tanker-safesea-vishnu-set-on-fire-in-persian-gulf-near-basrah-iraq-article-153814102
